string

Deny reason when outcome is deny.

Property Value

string

DurationMilliseconds

Elapsed duration in milliseconds.

public long DurationMilliseconds { get; }

Property Value

long

FailureCategory

Failure category when outcome is failure.

public string? FailureCategory { get; }

Property Value

string

Operation

Operation token in kebab-case.

Property Value

string

Outcome

Outcome token in kebab-case.

public string Outcome { get; }

Property Value

string

Optional parent window id as canonical guid string.

public string? ParentWindowId { get; }

Property Value

string

RequestUri

Property Value

string

string
